breaking.title: 4 Killed, 10 Injured In Russian Strikes On Ukraine's Kharkiv Region
breaking.summary: At least 15,850 civilians have been killed in Ukraine since Russia launched its invasion in 2022.

breaking.title: Ghayal hoon isiliye ghatak hoon! Why a global tech crash could be the right medicine for wounded Nifty bulls
breaking.summary: Global capital flows are shifting away from semiconductor-heavy markets like South Korea and Taiwan. This tech-led meltdown presents an opportunity for India. Foreign investors may return to Indian markets, which are seen as a diversified domestic-economy-led alternative. This shift could lead to an explosive rally for Indian stocks.

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iran, Israel say hostilities on hold after first attacks since truce
breaking.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced that the “fire on that front is contained” hours after Tehran said it had stopped its military action

breaking.title: Iran and Israel say they will pause strikes but warn of retaliation if ceasefire breached again
breaking.summary: Israel's PM says his country is holding fire "at the moment", after Iran's armed forces said they had stopped military action.

breaking.title: Trump booed in New York as he becomes first US president to attend NBA Finals
breaking.summary: The catcalls came after ticketholders faced airport-style security to enter the venue at Madison Square Garden.

breaking.title: c24 Indian sailors rescued from ship hit by U.S. missile
breaking.summary: Marivex sanctioned by the U.S. last December, had earlier carried Iranian oil to India; U.S. Central Command says the tanker violated the ongoing blockade by attempting to sail to an Iranian port; sailors likely to reach India in two days

breaking.title: U.S. judge strikes down Trump’s $100,000 H-1B visa fee, calls it unlawful
breaking.summary: U.S. District Judge Leo Sorokin in Boston issued the ruling in ‌a lawsuit filed by 20 Democratic state attorneys general challenging a fee Mr. Trump ‌announced in September that dramatically raised ‌the ⁠cost of obtaining H-1B visas.

breaking.title: Trinamool's Sabyasachi Dutta, Bidhannagar Ex-Mayor, Arrested On Extortion Charges
breaking.summary: Dutta had served as the mayor of Biddhannagar until 2019 (File)
